name: Kraken
philosophy: Kraken's website is a clean, trustworthy crypto exchange that uses purple as its commanding brand color.
trademark_signals: Kraken Purple (#7132f5) as primary brand with darker variants (#5741d8, #5b1ecf)
Near-black (#101114) text with cool blue-gray neutral scale
ai_slop_avoided: Don't use pill buttons — 12px is the max radius for buttons
Don't use other purples outside the defined scale
